mapper.delete: delete from nx_distributer_block where (blocker_nx_distributer_id = #{disId1} and blocked_nx_distributer_id = #{disId2}) or (blocker_nx_distributer_id = #{disId2} and blocked_nx_distributer_id = #{disId1})
mapper.select: select blocker_nx_distributer_id from nx_distributer_block where blocked_nx_distributer_id = #{blockedNxDistributerId}
